```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement database full-text search capabilities"
---
# Full-Text Search
## Task
Implement full-text search in the database.
## Requirements
1. Configure full-text indexes on searchable columns. 2. Implement search with ranking.
3. Support exact match, fuzzy match, and prefix search. 4. Handle stopwords and stemming.
5. Monitor search performance.
## Constraints
- Consider dedicated search engine (Elasticsearch) for complex needs. DB search for simple cases.
## Success Criteria
- Full-text search returns relevant results. Ranking works. Performance acceptable.
```
